ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the paper was published */,
  "source_title" TEXT /* Title of the source (e.g., journal, conference, book) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the paper in the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the paper is open access */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* The total number of citations the paper has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., department, school) */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "google_scholar_id" TEXT /* Google Scholar identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for professional communication */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's professional profile */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_paper" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "authorship_order" INTEGER /* The order of authorship in the paper */,
  "is_corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citation_index" TEXT /* Citation index (e.g., Scopus, Web of Science) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the citation source */,
  "citation_year" INTEGER /* The year in which the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "cited_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper that cited this paper */,
  "cited_paper_link" TEXT /* Link to the cited paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* The number of times this citation has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_papers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user uploaded the paper */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the paper is visible to other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_sources" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the source for the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the institution's website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
